combat.title: Combat
combat.surrenderConfirm: Are you sure? You will be at the mercy of your enemies.
combat.chatCriticalHit: {{actor}} lands a critical hit on {{target}} — {{damage}} damage ({{location}})
combat.playerDied: Your character has fallen in combat
combat.playerDiedDesc: With no Fate points remaining, death is final. Your journey ends here.
combat.spectatorDesc: You are now spectating. Your character is dead and cannot take any more actions.
combat.customAttackPlaceholder: Describe how you strike to earn a creativity bonus to the roll.
combat.customAttackHint: A richer, more tactical description can improve your chance to hit.
combat.outOfRange: Target too far for melee. Move closer or use Charge.

dialogue.title: Dialogue Mode
dialogue.notEnoughNpcs: Not enough NPCs nearby for dialogue mode
dialogue.cooldownHint: Dialogue mode on cooldown ({{scenes}} scenes remaining)

keys.title: API Keys
keys.subtitle: Configure your AI provider keys and model preferences.
keys.configureElevenlabs: ElevenLabs narration requires a backend connection and an `ELEVENLABS_API_KEY` environment variable on the server.
keys.configureSuno: Set your Suno API key in the Keys panel to generate music.

lobby.title: Dungeons & Sillicons
lobby.subtitle: Begin your solo RPG adventure. An AI Dungeon Master awaits to guide you through realms of your own making.
lobby.apiKeyDescription: Configure your OpenAI or Anthropic API key in Settings to start playing.
lobby.noCampaigns: No campaigns yet. Start a new adventure!
lobby.rejoinDescription: You were disconnected from a multiplayer game. Rejoin to continue playing.
lobby.loginSubtitle: Connect to a server to sync campaigns, characters and settings.
lobby.loginOnMainPage: Log in on the main page
lobby.forkFromSceneHint: Pick a scene to branch into a new campaign copy

creator.title: Forge a New Campaign
creator.subtitle: Define the parameters of your adventure. The AI Dungeon Master will craft a unique world tailored to your vision.
creator.careerClassHint: Leave as "Any" to let the AI choose a career fitting the story.
creator.characterNamePlaceholder: Leave empty to let the AI suggest a name...
creator.storyPromptLabel: What should the story be about?
creator.storyPlaceholder: A lone wanderer discovers an ancient artifact that grants the power to reshape reality, but each use erases a memory...
creator.generatePromptFromInput: Generate a topic from the entered text
creator.loadingTitle: The Grimoire stirs... crafting your world
creator.loadingDescription: The AI is generating your campaign world, story hook, character, and opening scene. This may take a moment.
creator.noApiKeyHint: Configure an API key in Settings before creating a campaign.
creator.noCharacterHint: Create or select a character before starting the campaign.

styleDesc.Hybrid: Story + dice rolls for key moments

gameplay.customActionPlaceholderVoice: Describe your action or click the mic...
gameplay.dialogueHint: Text in "quotes" will be spoken by your character
gameplay.searchForQuestsAction: I look around for available work, quests, or tasks — I ask locals, check notice boards, and listen for rumors
gameplay.characterDeadDesc: With no Fate points remaining, death is final.

chat.awaitingFirstMove: The DM awaits your first move...

character.noActiveDescription: Start or load a campaign to view your character sheet.
character.libraryDescription: Browse saved characters from your campaigns.
character.noSavedCharacters: No saved characters. Play a campaign to save characters.
character.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this character?
character.originsEmpty: The origins of this adventurer remain shrouded in mystery...

quests.selectQuest: Select a quest to view details
quests.returnToNpc: Return to {{npc}} to complete this quest

settings.localLLMDesc: Connect to a locally running LLM via Ollama or LM Studio for offline play.
settings.title: Dungeon Master Settings
settings.subtitle: Calibrate the arcane engine. Your choices here will reshape the narrative fabric of the realm.
settings.storyChaosDesc: The entropy of AI plot twists
settings.responseLengthDesc: How verbose the DM's narration is
settings.skillChecksDesc: How often dice rolls are required
settings.combatCommentaryFrequencyDesc: How often the AI adds a mid-combat commentary. Set to 0 to disable battle comments entirely.
settings.playerFreedomDesc: How much the AI follows vs leads the story
settings.sceneVisualizationDesc: How scenes are displayed during gameplay
settings.meshySettingsDesc: Generate 3D models on demand via Meshy.ai API
settings.meshyEnabledDesc: When off, 3D mode uses placeholder geometry only
settings.clearAssetCacheDesc: Remove all cached 3D models from browser storage
settings.modelTierDesc: Choose a recommended model or pick a specific one. Prices shown are input / output per 1M tokens.
settings.modelCustomDesc: Pick a specific model from the list
settings.apiKeysDescription: Keys are stored locally in your browser and never sent to any server besides the AI provider. You need at least one key to play.
settings.elevenlabsServerOnly: The ElevenLabs key is no longer configured in the form. The backend reads it only from the `ELEVENLABS_API_KEY` environment variable.
settings.sharedVoiceSettingsHint: These voice settings are shared globally for all players connected to the backend.
settings.voiceSelectPlaceholder: Enter API key to load voices
settings.npcVoicePoolDesc: These voices will be auto-assigned to NPCs as they appear in dialogue
settings.voicePickerHint: Click to set narrator voice. Use the group icon to add/remove from NPC pool. Use ♂/♀ to set voice gender.
settings.dialogueSpeedDesc: Speed up or slow down narration and dialogue playback
settings.canvasEffectsDesc: Particles, fog, weather overlays on scenes
settings.effectIntensityDesc: Controls particle density, fog opacity, and overall visual effect strength
settings.narratorStyleDesc: Fine-tune the Dungeon Master's writing voice and style
settings.poeticismDesc: From dry prose to rich, metaphor-laden narration
settings.grittinessDesc: From lighthearted tone to dark, brutal realism
settings.narratorDetailDesc: Amount of environmental and sensory description
settings.narratorHumorDesc: Amount of humor woven into narration
settings.narratorDramaDesc: From subtle narration to theatrical grandeur
settings.imageStyleDesc: Art style for AI-generated scene images and portraits
settings.darkPaletteDesc: Prefer dark, moody colors in generated images
settings.sfxDesc: AI-generated sound effects via ElevenLabs for impactful moments
settings.sfxEnabledDesc: Generate ambient sounds for combat, magic, and events
settings.sfxVolumeDesc: Volume level for generated sound effects
settings.musicDesc: Background music from local MP3/MP4 files for immersive scene atmosphere
settings.localMusicEnabledDesc: Play pre-uploaded MP3 tracks from the server
settings.localMusicDesc: Background music from pre-uploaded MP3 files on the server. Place MP3 files in backend/public/music/.
settings.musicVolumeDesc: Volume level for background music playback
settings.configBackupDesc: Export or import your full configuration including API keys, DM settings, and campaigns.
settings.exportConfigDesc: Save all settings and campaigns to a JSON file
settings.importConfigDesc: Load settings and campaigns from a JSON file
settings.importSuccess: Configuration imported successfully! Settings have been applied.
settings.importError: Failed to import configuration. Make sure the file is a valid Dungeons & Sillicons backup.
settings.configBackupWarning: The exported file contains your API keys. Keep it safe and do not share it publicly.
settings.backendDesc: Connect to a backend server for media caching, API key management, and cloud storage.
settings.backendPasswordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
settings.cacheStatsDesc: Cached media files on the server

gmModal.title: Game Master
gmModal.emptyGraph: No world data yet — start playing to populate the graph
gmModal.graphHint: Drag to pan, scroll to zoom, click nodes for details

species.HumanDesc: Versatile and ambitious, the most common folk of the Old World
species.HalflingDesc: Cheerful and resilient, with sharp eyes and sharper appetites
species.DwarfDesc: Stubborn and proud, master craftsmen and fearsome warriors
species.High ElfDesc: Ancient and graceful, wielders of powerful magic
species.HighElfDesc: Ancient and graceful, wielders of powerful magic
species.Wood ElfDesc: Wild and fierce, guardians of the deep forests
species.WoodElfDesc: Wild and fierce, guardians of the deep forests

charCreator.title: Create Character
charCreator.selectCareerFirst: Select a career to see available skills and talents.
charCreator.portraitDesc: Take a photo with your webcam or upload one. AI will transform it into a fantasy portrait while preserving your facial features.
charCreator.portraitNeedsKey: Portrait generation requires a Stability AI API key. Configure it in Settings.
charCreator.portraitNeedsKeyDalle: Portrait generation requires an OpenAI API key. Configure it in Settings.
charCreator.portraitNeedsKeyGemini: Portrait generation requires a Google AI API key. Configure it in Settings.
charCreator.portraitDescGemini: AI will generate a fantasy portrait of your character based on the selected species, gender, and career. You can also add a reference image or webcam photo to preserve facial likeness.
charCreator.portraitDescDalle: AI will generate a fantasy portrait of your character based on the selected species, gender, and career.
charCreator.portraitFiltered: The image was filtered by the AI safety system. Please try with a different photo.
charCreator.cameraError: Could not access camera. Try uploading a photo instead.
charCreator.referencePhotoHintGemini: Without a photo, AI will generate the portrait only from the character description. With a photo, it will try to preserve facial resemblance.

characterPicker.title: Your Character
characterPicker.createNewDesc: Generate a fresh character with the AI
characterPicker.useExistingDesc: Select a saved character from your roster
characterPicker.noCharacters: No saved characters yet. Play a campaign first to save characters.

system.diceRollMessage: {{skill}} test: d100 roll {{roll}} vs target {{target}} — SL {{sl}} — {{result}}

autoPlayer.title: AI Auto-Player
autoPlayer.customInstructionsPlaceholder: e.g. always try to haggle, avoid combat, flirt with NPCs...

multiplayer.backendRequiredDesc: Connect to a backend server in Settings to use multiplayer.
multiplayer.joinSubtitle: Enter the 4-character room code shared by the host.
multiplayer.createOrJoin: Create or join a multiplayer room
multiplayer.waitingForHostStart: Waiting for the host to start the game...
multiplayer.guestSettingsNotice: The host is configuring the campaign settings. You can see changes in real-time.
multiplayer.noPastCharacters: No past characters found. Play a solo campaign first to save characters.
multiplayer.openMultiplayerDesc: Convert this solo campaign to multiplayer so other players can join mid-game.
multiplayer.waitingForPlayers: Waiting for players to submit actions...
multiplayer.soloActionTooltip: Send only your action without waiting for others (3 min cooldown)
multiplayer.noRooms: No rooms available right now. Ask a host to share their code or create your own!

magic.title: Magic
magic.noSpells: No spells known for your lores.
magic.pickSpell: Select a spell from the list.
magic.miscastWarning: Miscast on the casting roll — see overlay for effect.

gallery.title: Campaign Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Browse community campaigns — like a workshop library for your next WFRP tale.
gallery.emptyHint: Check back later, or verify the /campaigns/public API is available.
gallery.noScenesReplay: No scenes to replay for this listing.

webcam.cameraError: Could not access camera. Please check permissions.
webcam.hint: Your camera and microphone will be shared with other players in the room.

stats.ws: Weapon Skill — your ability to hit in melee combat. Higher values mean more accurate sword swings, axe chops, and dagger thrusts.
stats.bs: Ballistic Skill — your accuracy with ranged weapons. Governs bows, crossbows, blackpowder weapons, and thrown objects.
stats.s: Strength — raw physical power. Your Strength Bonus adds to melee damage and affects climbing, swimming, and lifting.
stats.t: Toughness — physical resilience. Your Toughness Bonus reduces incoming damage from all sources.
stats.i: Initiative — speed of reaction. Determines combat order and aids perception, intuition, and tracking.
stats.ag: Agility — whole-body coordination and balance. Affects dodging, stealth, athletics, and movement speed.
stats.dex: Dexterity — fine motor skills and hand precision. Used for crafts, lock-picking, sleight of hand, and delicate work.
stats.int: Intelligence — mental acuity, memory, and knowledge. Governs research, healing, languages, and lore.
stats.wp: Willpower — mental fortitude and inner strength. Protects against fear, magic, and madness. Used for spellcasting.
stats.fel: Fellowship — charisma and social prowess. Affects haggling, leadership, charm, and manipulating others.

skills.Art: Create works of art in a chosen specialization (painting, sculpture, writing, etc.).
skills.Athletics: Physical fitness: running, jumping, throwing. Tested against Agility.
skills.Bribery: Bribing guards, officials, and other individuals. Tested against Fellowship.
skills.Charm: Persuading others through personal magnetism and charisma. Tested against Fellowship.
skills.Charm Animal: Calming and befriending animals. Tested against Willpower.
skills.Climb: Scaling walls, trees, cliffs, and other surfaces. Tested against Strength.
skills.Cool: Keeping calm under pressure and in stressful situations. Tested against Willpower.
skills.Consume Alcohol: Resisting the effects of intoxication. Tested against Toughness.
skills.Dodge: Evading blows, missiles, and traps in combat. Tested against Agility.
skills.Drive: Handling wagons, coaches, and other horse-drawn vehicles. Tested against Agility.
skills.Endurance: Withstanding hunger, exhaustion, disease, and harsh conditions. Tested against Toughness.
skills.Entertain: Amusing an audience with stories, music, juggling, etc. Tested against Fellowship.
skills.Gamble: Games of chance: cards, dice, betting. Tested against Intelligence.
skills.Gossip: Gathering rumors and information at taverns and markets. Tested against Fellowship.
skills.Haggle: Bargaining over prices when buying and selling. Tested against Fellowship.
skills.Intimidate: Frightening opponents through force or threats. Tested against Strength.
skills.Intuition: Gut feelings and detecting lies or danger. Tested against Initiative.
skills.Leadership: Commanding people, giving orders, and inspiring followers. Tested against Fellowship.
skills.Melee: Fighting with hand weapons in close combat (swords, axes, maces, etc.). Tested against WS.
skills.Navigation: Finding your way and orienteering across terrain. Tested against Initiative.
skills.Outdoor Survival: Surviving in the wild: hunting, shelter, fire. Tested against Intelligence.
skills.Perception: Noticing hidden things, tracks, and ambushes. Tested against Initiative.
skills.Ride: Riding a horse or other mount. Tested against Agility.
skills.Row: Rowing a boat or raft. Tested against Strength.
skills.Stealth: Moving quietly and staying hidden. Tested against Agility.
skills.Animal Care: Caring for animals: feeding, healing, breeding. Advanced skill (Int).
skills.Animal Training: Training animals to follow commands. Advanced skill (Int).
skills.Channelling: Gathering Winds of Magic before casting a spell. Advanced skill (WP).
skills.Evaluate: Appraising the value of goods and items. Advanced skill (Int).
skills.Heal: Treating wounds, diseases, and poisoning. Advanced skill (Int).
skills.Language: Knowledge of a foreign language (Reikspiel, Classical, Khazalid, etc.). Advanced skill (Int).
skills.Lore: Specialist knowledge in a field (law, theology, herbs, etc.). Advanced skill (Int).
skills.Perform: Stage performance: dance, acrobatics, show fights. Advanced skill (Ag).
skills.Pick Lock: Opening locks without a key using lockpicks. Advanced skill (Dex).
skills.Play: Playing a musical instrument. Advanced skill (Dex).
skills.Pray: Praying to the gods for blessings and miracles. Advanced skill (Fel).
skills.Ranged: Shooting ranged weapons (bows, crossbows, blackpowder). Advanced skill (BS).
skills.Research: Searching for information in libraries and archives. Advanced skill (Int).
skills.Sail: Sailing: handling sails and steering boats. Advanced skill (Ag).
skills.Secret Signs: Recognizing and creating secret symbols (thieves', guild marks). Advanced skill (Int).
skills.Set Trap: Setting mechanical traps for animals or people. Advanced skill (Dex).
skills.Sleight of Hand: Pickpocketing, planting items, hand tricks. Advanced skill (Dex).
skills.Track: Following the trails of people and animals. Advanced skill (I).
skills.Trade: Practising a craft (smithing, apothecary, carpentry, etc.). Advanced skill (Dex).

talents.Acute Sense: Heightened senses in a chosen area (sight, hearing, taste). +20 to related Perception tests.
talents.Ambidextrous: Equal proficiency with both hands. No penalty for off-hand fighting.
talents.Animal Affinity: Natural bond with animals. Animals instinctively trust you.
talents.Arcane Magic: Access to spells of a magical Tradition (Fire, Grey, etc.).
talents.Argumentative: Skilled at winning arguments. You may use Fellowship to defend in social disputes.
talents.Artistic: Natural artistic talent. Extra SL on Art tests.
talents.Attractive: Eye-catching appearance. +1 SL to social tests against those who might be interested.
talents.Beat Blade: Technique to knock aside an opponent's weapon. Special melee action.
talents.Beneath Notice: Higher-status people ignore you. Easier to slip away unnoticed.
talents.Berserk Charge: +1 SL to attack on the round you charge.
talents.Blather: You talk so fast and chaotically that you confuse your listener. Special social action.
talents.Bless: Priestly gift of divine Blessing. Minor divine miracles.
talents.Bookish: Love of books. Extra SL on Research tests.
talents.Break and Enter: Break-in specialist. Extra SL on Pick Lock and forcing doors.
talents.Briber: Natural talent for bribery. Extra SL on Bribery tests.
talents.Cardsharp: Card cheat master. Extra SL on card-based Gamble tests.
talents.Careful Strike: Precise blows that bypass armour. Ignore 1 AP in melee.
talents.Carouser: Life of the party. Extra SL on Consume Alcohol tests.
talents.Cat-tongued: Masterful manipulation. People believe your lies even after being exposed.
talents.Chaos Magic: Access to dark Chaos spells. Dangerous and forbidden magic.
talents.Combat Aware: Battle awareness. You cannot be surprised in combat.
talents.Combat Master: Master of fighting multiple opponents. No penalty for being surrounded.
talents.Combat Reflexes: +10 to Initiative when determining combat order.
talents.Commanding Presence: Authoritative voice and bearing. Your orders are automatically heard over noise.
talents.Concoct: Brewing healing potions and poisons from herbs.
talents.Contortionist: Extraordinary body flexibility. You can escape bonds and squeeze through tight spaces.
talents.Crack the Whip: Skilled whip use. Speeding up draft animals.
talents.Craftsman: Proficiency in a chosen craft. Extra SL on Trade tests.
talents.Criminal: Experience in the criminal underworld. Easier contacts with the underworld.
talents.Deadeye Shot: +1 SL when making a called shot with ranged weapons.
talents.Dealmaker: Born negotiator. Extra SL on Haggle tests.
talents.Diceman: Lucky at dice games. Extra SL on dice-based Gamble tests.
talents.Dirty Fighting: Low blows: sand in the eyes, kicks below the belt. +1 SL in melee when fighting dirty.
talents.Disarm: Technique to disarm an opponent. Special combat action.
talents.Distract: Divert an opponent's attention to give an ally an advantage.
talents.Doomed: A prophecy of death — your fate is written. You may fulfil or avoid it.
talents.Drilled: Military training. You can retreat in combat without provoking free attacks.
talents.Dual Wielder: Proficient fighting with two weapons simultaneously. Reduced off-hand penalty.
talents.Embezzle: Skill at embezzlement and misappropriation of funds.
talents.Enclosed Fighter: Specialist in fighting in tight spaces (tunnels, corridors). No penalty.
talents.Etiquette: Knowledge of etiquette in a given circle (nobles, guilds, criminals). Avoid faux pas.
talents.Fast Hands: Lightning-quick hands. Concealing an item is a free action.
talents.Fast Shot: Rapid shooting. Extra ranged attack per round.
talents.Fearless: Immune to fear of a chosen enemy type. Automatic success on Fear tests.
talents.Feint: Feint in melee combat. The opponent cannot defend against your next attack.
talents.Field Dressing: Quick battlefield wound treatment. Extra SL on Heal tests in combat.
talents.Flee!: Escape instinct. +1 SL to Athletics tests when fleeing from combat.
talents.Fleet Footed: +1 to Movement permanently. Faster on your feet.
talents.Frenzy: Enter a battle frenzy. +1 SL to attacks, but you cannot defend.
talents.Frightening: Your appearance terrifies. Enemies must pass a Cool test to approach.
talents.Furious Assault: Can spend Advantage to make an extra attack per combat round.
talents.Gregarious: Social butterfly. Extra SL on Gossip tests.
talents.Gunner: Proficiency with artillery and large blackpowder weapons.
talents.Hatred: Deep hatred of a chosen enemy. +1 SL to attacks, but you must fight.
talents.Holy Hatred: Sacred hatred — strikes against enemies of the faith ignore Armour Points.
talents.Holy Visions: You receive visions from your deity in dreams or trances.
talents.Hunter's Eye: Hunter's eye. Ignore penalties for partial cover on ranged shots.
talents.Impassioned Zeal: Fanatical religious zeal provides combat bonuses when defending the faith.
talents.Inspiring: Your bearing inspires others. Allies within earshot gain +1 SL on Cool tests.
talents.Instinctive Diction: Instinctively correct spell pronunciation. Reduced chance of miscasting.
talents.Invoke: Priestly gift of Invocation — calling upon greater divine miracles.
talents.Iron Jaw: Iron jaw. Ignore one Critical Hit to the head.
talents.Iron Will: +1 SL to all tests against magic and psychological effects.
talents.Jump Up: Instant recovery. Standing up from prone is a free action.
talents.Kingpin: Head of an underworld organization. You have a network of criminal contacts.
talents.Linguistics: Language talent. Extra SL on Language tests.
talents.Lip Reading: Read lips. Understand conversations at a distance without hearing.
talents.Luck: Extra Fortune points to spend on rerolls.
talents.Magic Resistance: Natural resistance to magic. Bonus to tests defending against spells.
talents.Magical Sense: Sense the presence of magic and the Winds of Magic.
talents.Master Tradesman: Mastery of a craft. You create items of the highest quality.
talents.Menacing: Threatening bearing. Extra SL on Intimidate tests.
talents.Mimic: Imitate voices and sounds. Extra SL on mimicry tests.
talents.Night Vision: See in the dark. Ignore penalties for poor lighting.
talents.Noble Blood: Noble birth. You have a title, coat of arms, and legal privileges.
talents.Nose for Trouble: Sense trouble coming. Extra SL on Intuition tests for danger.
talents.Numismatics: Currency expert. Spot forgeries and know exchange rates.
talents.Old Salt: Experienced sailor. Extra SL on tests at sea.
talents.Orientation: Innate sense of direction. Extra SL on Navigation tests.
talents.Panhandle: Effective begging. Extra SL when asking for alms.
talents.Perfect Pitch: Perfect musical ear. Extra SL on music-related tests.
talents.Petty Magic: Access to minor magical tricks (Petty Spells).
talents.Pharmacist: Pharmacist. Create medicines and identify poisons with a bonus.
talents.Pilot: Experienced helmsman. Extra SL on boat-steering tests.
talents.Public Speaking: Public speaker. Extra SL on speeches before crowds.
talents.Pure Soul: A pure soul resistant to the corruption of Chaos.
talents.Rapid Reload: Fast reload of ranged weapons. Reload is a free action instead of normal.
talents.Read/Write: The ability to read and write — rare in the Old World!
talents.Reaction Strike: Strike reactively at an enemy entering your reach.
talents.Resolute: Resolute in action. +1 SL on Cool tests against Intimidation.
talents.Resistance: Resistance to a chosen factor (disease, poison, Chaos). Extra SL on resistance tests.
talents.Reversal: Turn the opponent's technique against them. Use a failed enemy attack against them.
talents.Riposte: Counter-attack after a successful parry. Immediately strike back.
talents.River Guide: Knowledge of rivers and waterways. Safe navigation on water.
talents.Robust: +Toughness Bonus to defence against Critical Wounds.
talents.Rover: Experienced wanderer. No penalties for travelling through difficult terrain.
talents.Savant: Encyclopedic knowledge in a chosen field. Automatic success on simple Lore tests.
talents.Schemer: Born schemer. Extra SL on planning conspiracies and intrigues.
talents.Sea Legs: Sea legs. No penalty for actions on a rocking boat.
talents.Second Sight: Second Sight — you see the Winds of Magic and ethereal beings.
talents.Secret Identity: You have a hidden identity that nobody suspects.
talents.Shadow: Expert at tailing. Extra SL on Stealth tests in urban environments.
talents.Sharp: Sharp eye. Extra SL on Perception tests.
talents.Sharpshooter: Sharpshooter. Called shots deal extra damage.
talents.Shieldsman: Shield proficiency. Extra defensive bonus from shields.
talents.Sixth Sense: Sixth sense. The GM warns you about incoming danger.
talents.Slayer: Troll Slayer — sworn to die in battle against monsters. Extra SL fighting large creatures.
talents.Small: Small stature. Harder to hit, but shorter reach.
talents.Sniper: Expert sniper. Called shots from hiding don't reveal your position.
talents.Sprinter: Sprinter. Faster running over short distances.
talents.Step Aside: Extra Dodge per combat round. Avoid one additional attack.
talents.Stone Soup: Stone soup — the art of surviving on a minimum. You don't need to pay for upkeep.
talents.Stout-hearted: Stout heart. Extra SL on Cool tests against Fear.
talents.Strider: Move freely through a chosen difficult terrain (marshes, forests, mountains).
talents.Strike to Injure: Targeting weak points. +1 to Critical Hit level.
talents.Strike to Stun: Stunning blows. You can knock out instead of kill.
talents.Strong Back: Strong back. You can carry more than your Strength normally allows.
talents.Strong Legs: Strong legs. Longer jumps and faster climbing.
talents.Strong-minded: Strong mind resistant to manipulation. Extra SL on tests against mind control.
talents.Sturdy: Sturdy build. Extra resistance against being knocked down.
talents.Surgery: Surgery. Treat serious wounds and Critical Hits.
talents.Tenacious: Tenacious. Extra SL on Endurance tests.
talents.Tower of Memories: Perfect memory. You remember everything you've seen and heard.
talents.Trapper: Trap expert. Extra SL on Set Trap tests.
talents.Trick Riding: Horse acrobatics. Perform riding tricks in combat.
talents.Tunnel Rat: Tunnel and underground specialist. No penalty in tight spaces.
talents.Unshakable: Unshakable in the face of horror. Extra SL on tests against Terror.
talents.War Leader: War leader. Allies within earshot may use your Initiative.
talents.War Wizard: Battle mage. Cast spells in combat without penalty.
talents.Waterman: Water-person. Extra SL on tests on rivers and waterways.
talents.Wealthy: Wealthy character. You start with extra money and financial contacts.
talents.Well-prepared: Always prepared. Once per session you may declare you have a needed item.
talents.Witch!: Wild, unstable magical abilities. An untrained mage.
talents.Aethyric Attunement: Attunement to the Aethyr. Bonus on Channelling tests.
talents.Accurate Shot: Accurate shot. +1 SL on ranged attack rolls.
talents.Alley Cat: Alley cat. No penalty for operating in dark alleyways.
talents.Fisherman: Fisherman. Extra SL on fishing tests.
talents.Flagellant: Flagellant. Resistant to pain — ignore wound penalties.
talents.In-fighter: In-fighter. No penalty for unarmed combat.
talents.Nimble Fingers: Nimble fingers. Extra SL on tests requiring manual precision.
talents.Relentless: Relentless pursuit. The target cannot escape when you track them.
talents.Seasoned Traveller: Experienced traveller. Bonus to navigation and survival tests while travelling.

viewer.notFound: Campaign not found or link has expired
viewer.backendRequired: Backend connection required to view shared campaigns
